description: Top-level module that re-exports all public API surface: parse(), stringify(), stringify_pretty(), JsonValue, Error, and macros (array!, object!, value!). Acts as the single entry point for library consumers.

intermediate_nodes.description: Root module that re-exports all public types (JsonValue, Error), functions (parse, stringify, stringify_pretty), and macros (array!, object!, value!). Defines type aliases for Result<T>, Members, Entries, Array.

description: Core data model including JsonValue enum, Number type with mantissa/exponent representation, Object (custom hash map with inline key optimization), and Short (inline string optimization). Handles all type conversions, indexing, and value introspection.

intermediate_nodes.description: Defines the JsonValue enum with 7 variants (Null, Short, String, Number, Boolean, Object, Array). Provides dump/pretty serialization, type checking, type conversion (as_*), mutation (push, pop, insert, remove), and Index/IndexMut implementations.
Implements From trait for various types (str, Option, Vec, HashMap, BTreeMap, slices) and PartialEq comparisons. Uses Short optimization for small strings via unsafe from_slice.

Fixed-size inline string storage (MAX_LEN bytes) to avoid heap allocation for small strings. Provides unsafe from_slice constructor and safe as_str conversion. Implements Deref<Target=str> and various equality comparisons.

Custom Number type with (sign, mantissa, exponent) representation. Supports conversions to/from f64/f32, fixed-point extraction, arithmetic negation, and equality comparisons. Uses Grisu2 for float-to-number conversion.

Custom hash map implementation using sorted Vec<Node> with inline key optimization. Provides insert, get, get_mut, remove, iter, iter_mut operations. Implements Index, IndexMut, FromIterator, PartialEq.

intra_module_edges.description: value/mod.rs declares 'mod implements;' making the conversion implementations available. JsonValue's From implementations in implements.rs are used by value/mod.rs methods like push() which calls value.into().
intra_module_edges.evidence: IR shows value/mod.rs has 'sub_modules: ["mod implements;"]'. JsonValue::push calls 'value.into' which dispatches to From implementations.

intra_module_edges.description: JsonValue uses Short type for inline string storage. The as_str() method on JsonValue returns Short's internal string via short.as_str(). From<&str> for JsonValue uses Short::from_slice for short strings.
intra_module_edges.evidence: IR shows value/mod.rs uses 'crate::short::Short'. JsonValue::as_str calls 'short.as_str()'. From<&str> for JsonValue calls 'Short::from_slice'.

intra_module_edges.description: JsonValue uses Number type for numeric values. Methods like as_f64(), as_f32(), as_u64(), as_i64() delegate to Number's conversion methods. JsonValue::as_number() returns Option<Number>.
intra_module_edges.evidence: IR shows value/mod.rs uses 'crate::number::Number'. JsonValue::as_f64 calls 'value.into' on Number. JsonValue::as_fixed_point_u64 calls 'value.as_fixed_point_u64'.

intra_module_edges.description: JsonValue uses Object type for JSON objects. Methods like insert(), remove(), has_key(), entries(), len() delegate to Object's methods. Index<&str> for JsonValue delegates to Object::get.
intra_module_edges.evidence: IR shows value/mod.rs uses 'crate::object::Object'. JsonValue::insert calls 'object.insert'. JsonValue::remove calls 'object.remove'. JsonValue::has_key calls 'object.get'. JsonValue::entries calls 'object.iter'.

description: Recursive descent JSON parser using raw pointer arithmetic for performance. Handles string escaping, Unicode codepoints, number parsing with overflow detection, and nested structure validation with depth limits.

intermediate_nodes.description: Recursive descent parser with Parser struct using raw byte pointer for fast iteration. Handles string parsing with Unicode escapes, number parsing with overflow detection, and nested JSON structures with depth limit enforcement.
Defines Error enum with 5 variants for JSON parsing failures. Implements Display and std::error::Error traits. Provides wrong_type factory method.

intra_module_edges.description: Parser uses Error type for error reporting. Parser::unexpected_character constructs Error::UnexpectedCharacter. Parser::parse returns Result<JsonValue> which uses Error as the error type. Error propagation via ? operator flows through the parsing chain.
intra_module_edges.evidence: IR shows Parser::unexpected_character calls 'Err' with Error construction. Parser::parse has 'error_propagation: ["?"]' indicating error bubbling. The Result type alias in lib.rs is 'result::Result<T, Error>'.

description: JSON output layer with Generator trait abstraction. Provides four implementations: DumpGenerator (compact string), PrettyGenerator (indented string), WriterGenerator (generic writer), PrettyWriterGenerator (indented writer). Handles string escaping and number formatting.

intermediate_nodes.description: Generator trait defining JSON output interface. Four implementations: DumpGenerator (compact), PrettyGenerator (indented), WriterGenerator (generic writer), PrettyWriterGenerator (indented writer). Handles string escaping via ESCAPED lookup table.

description: Low-level number formatting utilities including Grisu2 float-to-string conversion algorithm, DIY floating-point type, and optimized decimal printing with lookup tables. Contains the majority of unsafe code isolated from higher layers.

intermediate_nodes.description: Module hub re-exporting diyfp, grisu2, and print_dec submodules.
DiyFp struct for high-precision float manipulation. Provides unsafe from_f64 via transmute, normalization, boundary computation, and cached powers of 10.
Implementation of Grisu2 float-to-string conversion algorithm. Contains unsafe functions for digit generation and rounding.
Optimized decimal number printing with lookup table (DEC_DIGITS_LUT). All functions are unsafe, using raw pointer arithmetic for buffer manipulation.

intra_module_edges.description: Grisu2 algorithm uses DiyFp type for high-precision float arithmetic. The convert() function calls DiyFp::from_f64, DiyFp::normalized_boundaries, DiyFp::normalize, and diyfp::get_cached_power.
intra_module_edges.evidence: IR shows grisu2.rs uses 'crate::util::diyfp::{ self, DiyFp }'. convert() calls 'DiyFp::from_f64', 'v.normalized_boundaries', 'diyfp::get_cached_power', 'v.normalize', 'digit_gen'.
